title: RBI (All India Financial Institutions – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Third Amendment Directions, 2026
description:
RBI amended capital adequacy norms for All India Financial Institutions by prescribing a zero percent risk weight for specified ECLGS 5.0 exposures. The amendment recognizes the reduced credit risk arising from government-backed guarantees.
The post RBI (All India Financial Institutions – Prudential Norms on Capital Adequacy) Third Amendment Directions, 2026 appeared first on TaxGuru.
